title: Pyrostria tulearensis
taxonomy: Pyrostria tulearensis is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This family comprises a large number of flowering plant species, commonly known as the madder family. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world, with over 13,000 species.
